info.title: GPLEX: Usage
info.description:
gplex [options] filename
default filename extension is ".lex"

options.name: /babel
options.description:
-- create extra interface for Managed Babel scanner
/caseInsensitive -- create a case-insensitive automaton

options.name: /check
options.description: -- create automaton but do not create output file

options.name: /codePage
options.description: -- default codepage NN if no unicode prefix (BOM)

options.name: /codePageHelp
options.description: -- display codepage help

options.name: /classes
options.description:
-- use character equivalence classes
/errorsToConsole -- legacy error-messages (not MSBUILD friendly)

options.name: /frame
options.description: -- use "path" as frame file

options.name: /help
options.description: -- display this usage message

options.name: /info
options.description: -- scanner has header comment (on by default)

options.name: /listing
options.description: -- emit listing even if no errors

options.name: /noCompress
options.description: -- do not compress scanner tables

options.name: /noCompressMap
options.description: -- do not compress character map

options.name: /noCompressNext
options.description: -- do not compress nextstate tables

options.name: /noFiles
options.description: -- no file input buffers, string input only

options.name: /noMinimize
options.description: -- do not minimize the states of the dfsa

options.name: /noParser
options.description:
-- create stand-alone scanner
/noPersistBuffer -- do not retain input buffer throughout processing

options.name: /noEmbedBuffers
options.description: -- write buffers to separate GplexBuffers file

options.name: /out
options.description:
-- send output to filename "path"
-- send output to Console.Out

options.name: /parseOnly
options.description: -- syntax check only, do not create automaton

options.name: /stack
options.description: -- enable built-in stacking of start states

options.name: /squeeze
options.description: -- sacrifice speed for small size

options.name: /summary
options.description: -- emit statistics to list file

options.name: /unicode
options.description: -- generate a unicode enabled scanner

options.name: /verbose
options.description: -- chatter on about progress

options.name: /version
options.description:
-- give version information for GPLEX
Terminating ...
GPLEX:  unknown argument: -help
